---
title: "Odds to Probability Distribution Transformations"
subtitle: "CSAS 2026"
author: "Naren Prakash"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(DataExplorer)
library(implied)
library(janitor)
```
```{r}
games <- read_csv("games.csv")
set.seed(24)
```
```{r}
game_odds <- games %>% select(B365H, B365D, B365A)

transformed_odds <- implied_probabilities(game_odds, method = "power")
head(transformed_odds$probabilities)
oddprobs <- data.frame(transformed_odds$probabilities)
```
```{r}
inspect_set <- games %>%
  select(Date, Season, HomeTeam, AwayTeam) %>%
  bind_cols(oddprobs) %>%
  clean_names()
inspect_set %>% ggplot(aes(x = b365h)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 40) +
  ggtitle("Empirical histogram of Bet365 Home Probs")
```

```{r}
data <- inspect_set$b365h
qqnorm(data, main = "Normal Q-Q Plot")
qqline(data, col = "red")
plot(ecdf(data))
```
```{r}
plot_histogram(inspect_set[-4])
```
```{r}
summary(inspect_set)
```
```{r}
inspect_set <- inspect_set %>%
  bind_cols(games$FTR) %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  rename(result = x8)
```
```{r}
inspect_set %>%
  filter(season == 2004) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = b365h)) +
  geom_line()
```
```{r}
inspect_long <- pivot_longer(inspect_set, cols = c("b365h", "b365d", "b365a"), names_to = "odds_type", values_to = "betting_odds")
inspect_long %>%
  filter(season == 2004) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = betting_odds, colour = odds_type)) +
  geom_line()
```
```{r}
inspect_wide <- inspect_set %>%
  mutate(value = 1) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = result, values_from = value, values_fill = 0) %>%
  select(-"NA")
```
```{r}
library(patchwork)

inspect_long <- inspect_set %>%
  filter(season == 2004) %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c("b365h", "b365d", "b365a"),
    names_to = "odds_type",
    values_to = "betting_odds"
  )

plot1 <- ggplot(inspect_long, aes(x = date, y = betting_odds, color = odds_type)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title = "Betting Odds")

plot2 <- ggplot(
  inspect_wide %>% filter(season == 2004) %>% mutate(date = as.Date(date)),
  aes(x = date, y = H)
) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "Match Results")
plot1 / plot2
```

```{r}
# Join actual results to the long format
inspect_long_with_results <- inspect_long %>%
  mutate(
    result_indicator = case_when(
      odds_type == "b365h" & result == "H" ~ 1,
      odds_type == "b365d" & result == "D" ~ 1,
      odds_type == "b365a" & result == "A" ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ 0
    )
  )

# Plot odds lines with actual results overlaid
ggplot(inspect_long_with_results, aes(x = date, y = betting_odds, color = odds_type)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_point(
    data = filter(inspect_long_with_results, result_indicator == 1),
    aes(x = date, y = betting_odds),
    size = 2,
    shape = 21,
    fill = "white",
    stroke = 1.5
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Bet365 Odds vs Actual Results (2004 Season)",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Probability",
    color = "Odds Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Looking at match level-predictions vs match-level results (crudely)

```{r}
predictions <- inspect_long %>% group_by(date, season, home_team, away_team) %>% summarize(betting_odds = max(betting_odds)) %>% ungroup() %>% left_join(inspect_long) %>% mutate(odds_type = toupper(str_remove_all(odds_type, "^b365")))
print(mean(predictions$odds_type == predictions$result))
```


```{r}
matchweeks <- inspect_set %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  group_by(season) %>%
  mutate(matchweek = as.integer(difftime(date, min(date), units = "weeks")) + 1) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
write_csv(matchweeks, "matchweeks.csv")
```
